CS 124 Introduction to Computer Science I credit: 3 Hours.

Introduction to programming and computational problem solving.

Prerequisite: Credit or concurrent registration in MATH 220 or MATH 221.

CS 225 Data Structures credit: 4 Hours.

Data structures, algorithms, and software engineering.

Prerequisite: CS 124.

CS 233 Computer Architecture credit: 4 Hours.

Computer organization and architecture.

CS BAD This malformed heading has no credit marker

Prerequisite: Should not become a course.

CS 225 Data Structures credit: 4 Hours.

Duplicate catalog representation.

Prerequisite: malformed [
